settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Tune refresh behavior, desktop closing, and agent targets.
settings.refreshHint: Search uses local cache until this interval expires. Manual refresh always checks now.
settings.minimizeToTrayHint: The close button hides the window; click the tray icon to restore.
settings.translationHint: Click "Save translation settings" to write to config; changes are not saved while typing.
settings.translationProviderHint: Service used to translate English skill content
settings.translationApiUrlHint: Leave empty for default OpenAI URL
settings.translationCliCmdHint: e.g. claude; prompt is sent on stdin

warnings.refreshFailed: Some enabled sources could not refresh.
warnings.usingCache: Using local cache for one or more sources.
warnings.hint: Available skills are still shown. Enable domestic mirrors or disable unreachable sources from Sources if this keeps happening.

library.loading: Refreshing source cache. Network checks time out after 30 seconds.
library.emptyUnreachable: No skills from reachable enabled sources. Check Sources or enable domestic mirrors.
library.installTargetHint: Skills install into the central library first. Checked agents receive links so their tools can load the skill.
library.customTargetId: Id (lowercase letter first; digits and hyphens allowed)
library.customTargetHint: Saved to the agents map in ~/.suit-skills/config.json; installs still write .agents first, then symlink here.

sources.title: Sources
sources.mirrorAllTitleNone: No domestic mirrors available for built-in sources
sources.mirrorAllTitleOff: Switch all built-in sources to domestic mirror URLs
sources.mirrorAllTitleOn: Switch all built-in sources to upstream URLs
sources.deleteTitleLast: At least one source must stay enabled
sources.toggleTitleLast: At least one source must stay enabled
sources.confirmDelete: Delete source "{{name}}"? Installed skills are not removed. {{description}}

agents.title: AI Coding Agents
agents.subtitle: Configure where each coding agent reads skills. Installs stay in the central library, then selected agents get links.
agents.libraryHint: This is the real install location. Agent folders point back here when a skill is enabled.
agents.deleteDisabled: Built-in agents can be edited but not removed
agents.confirmDelete: Remove custom agent "{{name}}" from config? Installed skills and folders are not deleted.

default.label: Suit Skills default catalog
default.description: Default skill library maintained for Suit Skills, enabled by default on new installs.

anthropics-skills.label: Anthropic official skills
anthropics-skills.description: Official Claude skills collection—solid foundation for your skill sources.

superpowers.label: Superpowers engineering skills
superpowers.description: Engineering-focused skills for complex development, TDD, debugging, and refactoring.

vercel-agent-skills.label: Vercel Agent skills
vercel-agent-skills.description: Skills centered on Web, full-stack, Next.js, and deployment workflows.

huggingface-skills.label: Hugging Face skills
huggingface-skills.description: Skills for the Hugging Face and open-source model ecosystem.

antigravity-awesome-skills.label: Antigravity awesome skills
antigravity-awesome-skills.description: Cross-platform collection of AI skill resources.

awesome-claude-skills.label: Awesome Claude skills index
awesome-claude-skills.description: Curated index of Claude skill resources—great for discovering more sources.

apiErrors.sourceNameInvalid: Source name may only contain letters, numbers, dot, underscore, and dash
apiErrors.cannotRemoveLastSource: Cannot remove the last enabled source
apiErrors.cannotDisableLastSource: Cannot disable the last enabled source
apiErrors.pathNotAllowed: Resolved skill path is outside the install target
apiErrors.sourceTargetHasSkill: Source target already has this skill
apiErrors.clipboardWindowsOnly: Copying a file to the clipboard is currently supported on Windows only
apiErrors.installTargetIdLength: Install target id must be 2–48 characters (letters, digits, hyphen)
apiErrors.installTargetIdLetter: Install target id must start with a letter
apiErrors.installTargetPath: Paths must start with ~/ or ./ and must not contain ..
